## Problem

What problem or workflow limitation are you running into?

## Proposed Solution

What would you like PromptQuery to do?

## Use Case

Who would use this feature, and when?

## Database Or MCP Context

If relevant, include database type, MCP client, or agent workflow details.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried another workaround or tool?

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, mockups, examples, or links if useful.
